forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers and patchy fog before 5pm, then patchy fog and scattered rain showers. Cloudy. High near 44, with temperatures falling to around 41 in the afternoon. Northeast wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and scattered rain showers before 1am, then widespread fog and a slight chance of drizzle. Cloudy, with a low around 35. East northeast wind 2 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.shortForecast: Widespread Fog then Slight Chance Rain Showers
forecast.detailedForecast: Widespread fog and a slight chance of drizzle before 2pm, then a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy. High near 52, with temperatures falling to around 50 in the afternoon. Southeast wind 2 to 7 mph.

forecast.name: Friday Night
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7pm, then rain likely and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 47. South wind 7 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

sections.content: Cross Country Ski Trail Conditions as of March 5, 2026 –

Our last day of skiing will be Sunday, March 8, 2026, weather and conditions permitting.  Due to conditions the trail will not be groomed today. It was last groomed on Wednesday, March 4, 2026.  The connector trail from the ski center to Bucks Run is no longer available.  Please know that you will have to walk to the start of the trail.  For your safety and the safety of our staff please adhere to Bucks Run hours.  Bucks Run is open Monday – Friday 12 pm – 7:45 pm and Saturday – Sunday 9 am – 7:45 pm, weather and conditions permitting.

Huron Meadows Metropark (Brighton).conditions: Excellent again. Fresh groom/till this AM held up well…fast and hard. Probably another day left tomorrow since it will freeze again tonight.

Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: The morning sweet spot for the last 3 days has been awesome . The groomers are taking full advantage of the 20 inch hardpack base .

nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails were groomed and tracked on Monday morning. The upper Red Trail will be groomed and tracked again this morning.
nubsNob.nightSkiing: Night Skiing is Tuesday thru Saturday from 5:30 to 9:00 p.m. Night skiing ends on March 14.
nubsNob.comments: We are in a freeze and thaw cycle currently. When the frozen snow is groomed the result is a granular snow sometimes referred to as "corn snow". This type of snow can be great for skiing especially as it just starts to soften, today the timing should be late morning to the early afternoon. Skiers sometimes refer to this golden time as "corn o'clock". The high today will reach just over 40 degrees and some sunshine is predicted. The soup of the day is sausage and potato. Pintail Peak Lodge is open with an espresso bar and food service. The lifts will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. with an hour break at 4:30 p.m. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
